svg.text: Fully offline · Privacy-preserving · GPU-accelerated · Three meeting types
UI toggle · speaker-label required for MoM attendees
✓ existing optional dep · toggle in UI ★
Link session ↔ Outlook event by time
EXTRACTION LAYER — Meeting-Type-Aware LLM Prompting ★ ENHANCED
Prompt: continuation + delta from prior calls
Output: progress items, new targets, blockers
Prompt: formal MoM template with attendees
★ no action items unless explicitly stated
REVIEW & APPLY LAYER — Human-in-the-Loop Gate (UNCHANGED INVARIANT)
Accept / Edit / Reject per item · bulk actions ★
wall-clock ts → segment offset · LLM "pay attention here"
STORAGE LAYER — Plain Files, No Database
All components run fully offline · GPU (RTX 5090) used for Whisper + LLM · No network at runtime · Zero external APIs
